interpretation_summary: The Squarespace subscription renewal payment has failed, and action is required to avoid suspension of the service.

entity_changes.source_fact: We were unable to charge your card ending in 4242 for your Squarespace subscription renewal

obligation_changes.title: Update Squarespace billing information
obligation_changes.description: The billing information for the Squarespace subscription needs to be updated to avoid suspension of the site.
obligation_changes.source_fact: Your site will be suspended in 7 days if payment is not updated.

proposed_actions.description: Notify the user to update their Squarespace billing information.
proposed_actions.rationale: To prevent suspension of the Squarespace site due to failed payment.
